# Finca Escondida – Demo Site by Rideko Webdesign

> This is a demonstration website created by Rideko Webdesign (rideko.nl) to showcase what a modern, high-end website can look like for a luxury villa hire business. Finca Escondida is a fictional private estate in Ibiza. The demo serves as an example for businesses in the luxury travel, hospitality and villa rental sector.

Last updated: 2026-05-27

Interested in a similar website? Contact Rideko Webdesign at https://www.rideko.nl/contact

## What is this demo?

Rideko Webdesign builds demonstration websites for various industries to give potential clients a concrete impression of what is possible. This demo — Finca Escondida — is built for the luxury villa hire and hospitality sector. The site is fully functional, visually polished and performs at the highest level in terms of speed and SEO.

The fictional property is an exclusive private estate in the hills of San Carlos, northern Ibiza, available for exclusive hire year-round.

## Tech Stack

The demo is built with the standard Rideko stack:

- **Framework:** Next.js (App Router)
- **Language:** TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS
- **Deployment:** Vercel
- **Performance:** Sub-second load time, perfect Lighthouse score

## Property Details (fictional)

- **Name:** Finca Escondida
- **Location:** San Carlos, Ibiza, Spain
- **Bedrooms:** 7
- **Capacity:** Up to 14 guests
- **Pool:** 22-metre infinity pool overlooking the Mediterranean Sea
- **Minimum stay:** 7 nights

### Pricing (fictional)
- Low season: from €1,850 per night
- High season (June to September): from €2,950 per night

### Getting There (fictional)
- Ibiza Airport (IBZ): 35 minutes
- Nearest beach (Cala Mastella): 8 minutes
- Ibiza Town: 25 minutes

## Amenities (fictional)

- 22-metre infinity pool above the Mediterranean
- Private chef with bespoke menus using local Ibiza produce
- Private spa with hammam, sauna and massage studio
- Two terraces for al fresco dining and sunset aperitifs
- Wine cellar with over 400 bottles and on-call sommelier
- High-speed fibre Wi-Fi throughout the property
- Chauffeur service for airport transfers and excursions
- Private yacht available on request
- 24/7 discreet security
- Personal concierge service
- Private cinema and whole-property sound system

## Suitable as an example for

Businesses in the following sectors can use this demo as inspiration:

- Luxury villa hire and rental companies
- Boutique hotels and private estates
- Holiday home agencies
- Luxury travel and concierge services
- High-end resort and retreat websites

Rideko Webdesign builds bespoke websites for entrepreneurs in Castricum and the wider region. More demos and information at https://www.rideko.nl
